Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Apr-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Gail Victoria Rouda, Esq. appeared with Robin Rouda Newman, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for Claimant Frances Rouda, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
David Rouda, Esq. was also present and specially appeared with petitioner.
Order appointing Ms. Newman Guardian ad Litem for Ms. Frances Rouda was filed on November 22, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $160,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $64,000.00.

The net balance of $96,000.00 shall be paid to the Trustee of the Rouda Family Trust for the benefit of Claimant Frances Rouda.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to June 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the deposit of the net proceeds of the settlement into the Rouda Family Trust for the benefit of Frances Rouda.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs STEPHEN B. RUBEN, ESQ., THE RUBEN LAW FIRM, and RUBEN-HUGGINS AN ASSOCIATION OF FAMILY LAW ATTORNEYS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Defendants' motion for summary judgment is off calendar per request of the moving party (email dated 3/5/19).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR#5976, ssawyer@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/EPS)
